problem: What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk?
hypothesis: What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Liquid. Liquid crystal elastomer actuation directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 36 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
